results.verdict_reason: late-window ATM sell premium is real GROSS (+2.3 to +2.7c, consistent sign train/nontest) but below honest single-leg execution cost (1.5c half-spread + ~1.7c Kalshi taker fee at a ~0.58 fill); net negative on BOTH splits, bootstrap CI spans 0, gate failed

memo's frozen taker spec reproduced EXACTLY (locked-panel trade set 587 trades / 492 events == memo's frozen-spec counts; lane net there +1.67c vs memo +3.24c, gap == the pre-declared harsher execution: candle-mid + flat 1.5c half-spread + per-order-ceiling Kalshi fee vs at-the-touch + unrounded fee). The favorite-longshot premium is real gross (combined gross +5.0c train / +4.5c nontest; favorite leg net +7.6c/+6.4c with bootstrap CI lo > 0) but the DECISIVE combined gate FAILS on BOTH splits: season-split late-half decay (walkforward Apr +3.3c -> May +0.9c -> Jun n=3 -47.5c; the memo's pre-flagged May-compression and June failure modes materialized) and parity-split instability; the longshot leg (75% of trades) is ~zero net under lane taker execution (+0.3-0.5c, CI spans 0, May negative); the favorite leg alone is structurally n-starved (125-151 trades < 200 floor). DEAD as a taker strategy under lane execution discipline; the memo's maker variant (+3.59c conditional on fill) is the natural successor hypothesis.

params.correction: PM taker flat-2%-of-notional + legacy curve -> official per-category parabolic (sports 300bps); Kalshi maker = 0.0175 quarter-of-taker on quadratic_with_maker_fees series only
params.method: analytical re-rate: fee enters per-trade PnL additively; delta(p)=legacy-official applied to memo means/CIs; NBA per-market caches absent on disk so end-to-end re-run deferred to cache rebuild

spreads_maker_pm_n726.note: already official (PM maker $0); 20-25% maker rebate additionally uncredited

spreads_maker_kalshi_n726.note: memo charged FULL taker to maker fills; official NBA maker = 0.0175 factor

totals_pace_n1107.note: retraction STANDS (no positive edge) but 'execution-killed at -1c' softens to ~breakeven

totals_extremes.note: high-price legs over-charged 9-22x; needs cache rebuild + true re-run; original DEAD also cited measurement artifact

results.not_contaminated: crypto + weather families (venue=kalshi taker fees real, see avg_fee in their ledger rows); paper books (weather maker_fee_c=0.0 correct, crypto scan bills Kalshi taker)
results.verdict_reason: Repo carried 5+ divergent fee models; research lab charged a Polymarket fee that does not exist in the official schedule (flat 2% of notional) as the default for every PM-venue evaluation, and charged makers either $0 or FULL taker. Unified into venue_fees (golden-tested); corrected cost floor: PM-sports taker ~2.25c all-in ATM (was ~3.3c), maker fee floor ~0 (PM) / 0.44c batch (Kalshi NBA). No gate verdict flips (stability sub-gates are level-independent), but PROGRAM_STATE's cost-floor rationale is restated.
